findings.title: Reset tokens use a non-cryptographic random source

reasoning: All repository files were inspected. Password hashing uses bcrypt with cost 12 and verification uses bcrypt.compare. Reset-token digest comparison is length-checked and uses timingSafeEqual, and the password reset limiter is mounted before its route. However, reset tokens are generated with Date.now and Math.random rather than a CSPRNG, so A-SEC-6 fails.
